creative_brief: Split-screen visual: left shows industrial truck convoy on highway, right shows green pastures with cattle grazing under open sky.
primary_text: 2,400km. That's the average journey for supermarket beef before it hits cold storage for weeks. Rachel Ward raises grass-fed cattle 300km north of Sydney on regenerative pastures. No feedlots, no hormones, no antibiotics. Her beef reaches our Brookvale hub within days of processing. You can taste the difference. No commitment. Order when you want. Collect from Brookvale Monday to Friday. Own a piece of the farm-direct future.
headline: 2,400km journey vs 300km from pasture
description: Rachel Ward's grass-fed beef reaches Brookvale hub days after processing. Equity crowdfunding now open. Not financial advice.
